name: Elyndor Mournshade
sd_appearance: tall, lithe elf with silver-streaked hair cascading over a scalp of dusky skin, violet eyes flickering like dying embers, their patchwork cloak stitched from frayed velvet, leather, and moth-eaten silk draped over worn-but-loved boots, a red armband peeking from beneath a medicinal pouch slung across their chest, hands stained deep with ink from transcribing prayers while a jagged scar traces the curve of their jaw—a relic of a forbidden spell once whispered to save their sister.
faction_visual: patchwork cloth of many fabrics, red armband, worn-but-loved boots, medicinal pouch
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
